source_title: Escola de Dados — Primeiros passos no jornalismo de dados
author: Escola de Dados

extracts.extract: Numbers alone are not relevant — you need to answer 'so what?': what do these numbers affect, who do they affect, and how?
It is fundamental to read the notes on data-recording methodologies. The date a piece of data was recorded may differ from the date the recorded event actually occurred.
